message:
test: check in proptest regression seeds for output_format tests

Proptest recommends checking in .proptest-regressions files so that
previously-discovered failure cases are re-tested on every run. This
seed reproduces a shrunk edge case (input index 0) that triggered a
formatting boundary condition in the output format property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 9ab9612487172f60ace58c2d11218d365f2ab3e2bb1d21dbffa79f637193ffeb # shrinks to _i = 0
